title: Watch: What’s really happening inside the Aam Aadmi Party?
description: What’s going on between Aam Aadmi Party and its leader Raghav Chadha? Amid growing speculation, questions are being raised about his role within the party and the larger political context. We break down the developments, what’s known so far, and what it could mean going forward. To discuss this, we are joined by Sayantan Ghosh, author of The Aam Aadmi Party: The Untold Story of a Political Uprising and Its Undoing.
